description_for_human: Send AI-guided photo requests and receive review-ready briefs.
description_for_model: PhotoBrief turns customer photos into business-ready briefs. Use this plugin to create app-free, AI-guided photo requests on behalf of a business, retrieve recipient URLs to forward by SMS or email, and look up pricing and FAQ content. Recipients never need to install an app. Pricing is per submitted/analyzed photo: 1 photo = 1 PhotoBrief Credit. The plugin authenticates with a bearer API key issued on the Business plan.
